title: Heterosteca americana
taxonomy: Heterosteca americana is classified as a species of moth in the family Limacodidae. The family Limacodidae belongs to the order Lepidoptera. Within the order Lepidoptera, Limacodidae is part of the superfamily Zygaenoidea. This classification helps to categorize Heterosteca americana within the broader taxonomic hierarchy of moths.
